calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL W. FOX of K&L Gates, Tel No. (415) 882-8017 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAY AJALTOUNI'S MOTION FOR MANDATORY RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is DENIED. CCP sec. 473(b) specifies that an application for relief under the statute must be made "no more than six months after entry of judgment." "The six month time limit for granting relief under section 473 is jurisdictional and relief cannot be granted under section 473 if the application for such relief is instituted more than six months after the entry of the judgment'" (Aldrich v. San Fernando Valley Lumber Co. (1985) 170 Cal.App.3d 725, 735, fn. 3.) Default judgment was entered on April 14, 2014. Defendant's motion was not filed until October 15, 2014, beyond the six month period. Based on the plain language of CCP sec. 473(b), the motion must be denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Continued To Jan-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL W. FOX OF K & L GATES, TEL. NO. 882-8017 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAY AJALTOUNI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is continued to January 5, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 4, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg
